headline: Merck & Co. Inc. (NYSE:MRK): A High Dividend Rating Backed by Strong Profitability and Financial Health
summary: Merck offers a sustainable 2.99% dividend yield, backed by high profitability and solid financial health. With a strong dividend history and industry-leading margins, MRK stands out as a reliable income stock for long-term investors.
